title: Vinegar Rice Feast
description: A tangy, chewy, indulgent Chinese dish featuring seasoned rice vinegar, high-protein-friendly options and bhuna spices.

ingredients.name: Vinegar
ingredients.notes: Rice vinegar or any other tangy vinegar, seasoned as per recipe

ingredients.name: Garlic
ingredients.notes: Pressed and roasted with onions for bhuna spice mixture

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: To taste, for seasoning bhuna spice mixture

instructions: Rinse the rice and prepare it as per usual cooking instructions.
In a separate pan, mix chopped onions, pressed garlic, cumin powder, turmeric powder, and salt. Saute for about 2 minutes until onions turn golden brown.
Add seasoned vinegar to the onion mixture and cook for another minute or two until fragrant.
Mix the cooked rice with the vinegar-based bhuna spice mixture evenly and serve as a meal.
